human_actions_pending.action: Test latest closing flow in browser
human_actions_pending.context: Need to verify tiered closing (100/110/120%) works end-to-end with real 5-min interview
Agent was running during session but may have exited. Use: cd agent && python entrevista_agent.py dev

decisions.decision: Use Claude Haiku 4.5 + ephemeral caching as default LLM
decisions.rationale: ~$0.12/interview vs ~$0.95 with Sonnet 4, quality comparable with improved prompt

decisions.decision: Consultant-role framing for agent, not research interviewer
decisions.rationale: User needs discovery calls that feed proposals, not academic interviews

decisions.decision: Use LiveKit RoomEvent.TranscriptionReceived for transcripts (not data channel)
decisions.rationale: Built-in LiveKit feature matches prototype pattern, handles interim→final updates

decisions.decision: Override Agent.on_user_turn_completed() as class method (not session event)
decisions.rationale: LiveKit 1.5.2 does not expose user_turn_completed as session event

decisions.decision: NO session.say() at 80/90/100% — only system prompt updates
decisions.rationale: Prevents agent voice overlapping with LLM response generation

decisions.decision: Tiered closing: 100% LLM closes, 110% canned goodbye, 120% silent kill
decisions.rationale: Guarantees proper closing UX while preventing runaway calls

decisions.decision: MXN price ranges ($15K-$35K per phase) instead of USD fixed prices
decisions.rationale: NSS target market is Mexican small businesses; USD anchors too high

decisions.decision: Access model: 'Acceso completo + licencia de uso permanente' (not 'dueña del código')
decisions.rationale: Protects NSS IP for reuse while giving client everything they care about

decisions.decision: /generate-proposal skill automates proposal generation from Supabase transcripts
decisions.rationale: Scales the Ximena workflow to future clients

next_action: Run /catch-up to load context, then test the Ximena 5-min link (http://localhost:3005/interview/9aefb39a-c5ab-4a0e-95c8-0e00022fb83f) in fresh incognito to validate tiered closing flow
context_notes: Phase 3 is functionally complete — agent works, transcripts save, proposal generation skill works. What remains is validating the latest round of closing/merging/rejoin fixes end-to-end. The last tested state was before the final batch of commits (99d7b28 and later). Critical commits to verify: 99d7b28 (graceful tiered closing), 92369f3 (time management), a626231 (generate-proposal skill). Ximena had a successful 22-min interview earlier in session; a full proposal exists at analysis/ximena-corcuera-proposal.html.
